case_title: GLASS, CHARLES vs. GULLIKSON, GRANT et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GULLIKSON, GRANT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1155 ELLIS ST APT B-201 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 941, LEASE FORFEITED, S/E JUDGMT UNTIL 27-NOV-96 5PM. FURTHER S/E TO 15-JAN-97; 31 JAN-97; 28-FEB-97 DEPENDING UPON PAYMENTS AGREED UPON BY PLT AND DEFT. COURT MAY ISSUE WRIT BEFORE 28-FEB-97 ONLY UPON DE CLARATION OF PLT'S ATTY STATING DEFT'S FAILURE TO PAY. NO OTHER S/E MAY ISSUE. SEE JUDGMENT FOR ANY FURTHER DETAILS
